name: NumberInput
description: NumberInput allow users to enter numbers into a UI.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the input's value is changed by the user. Provides new value as a callback's argument.

props.name: allowDecimal
props.description: Enables ability to enter decimal numbers.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: The control's autocomplete attribute.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: The control's autofocus attribute.

props.name: className
props.description: The control's wrapper class name.

props.name: controlProps
props.description: The control's html attributes.

props.name: controlRef
props.description: React ref provided to the control.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The control's default value, used when the component is not controlled.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates that the user cannot interact with the control.

props.name: endContent
props.description: User's node rendered after input node and clear button.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error text.

props.name: errorPlacement
props.description: Error placement.

props.name: hasClear
props.description: Shows the icon for clearing control's value.

props.name: hiddenControls
props.description: Hides increment/decrement buttons at the end of control.

props.name: id
props.description: The control's id attribute.

props.name: label
props.description: Help text rendered to the left of the input node.

props.name: max
props.description: Max allowed value. Used for clamping entered value to allowed range.

props.name: min
props.description: Min allowed value. Used for clamping entered value to allowed range.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute of the control.

props.name: note
props.description: An optional element displayed under the lower right corner of the control.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Fires when the control lost focus.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires when the input's value is changed by the user.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Fires when the control gets focus.

props.name: onKeyDown
props.description: Fires when a key is pressed.

props.name: onKeyUp
props.description: Fires when a key is released.

props.name: pin
props.description: The control's border view.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text that appears in the control when it has no value set.

props.name: qa
props.description: Test ID attribute (data-qa).

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Indicates that the user cannot change control's value.

props.name: shiftMultiplier
props.description: Step multiplier when shift button is pressed.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the control.

props.name: startContent
props.description: User's node rendered before label and input node.

props.name: step
props.description: Delta for incrementing/decrementing entered value with arrow keyboard buttons or component controls.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tabindex attribute of the control.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state.

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the control.

props.name: view
props.description: The view of the control.

name: Overlay
description: The Overlay component renders an overlay over the parent element with the relative position, i.e., the parent element must have position set to relative.

props.name: background
props.description: Overlay background style.

props.name: children
props.description: Content (usually, a Loader component).

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name of the root element.

props.name: visible
props.description: Overlay visibility state.

name: Pagination
description: This component renders pagination.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Called when the page number or pageSize is changed.

props.name: page
props.description: Current page number.

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Number of data items per page.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: compact
props.description: Hides the title for the First, Previous, and Next buttons. Always set to true in mobile version.

props.name: pageSizeOptions
props.description: Allows you to specify the sizeChanger options.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: showInput
props.description: Shows input to navigate to pages directly.

props.name: showPages
props.description: Shows page numbering.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the pagination items.

props.name: total
props.description: Total number of data items.

examples: <Pagination page={1} pageSize={100} total={1000} onUpdate={(page, pageSize) => setState({page, pageSize})} />

name: Palette
description: The Palette component is used to display a grid of icons, emojis, reactions, and symbols which you can select or deselect.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: aria-label HTML attribute.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: ID of the visible Palette caption element.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of elements per row.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Sets the initial value state when the component is mounted.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the options.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Enables selecting multiple options.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: onBlur event handler.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: onFocus event handler.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the user (un)selects an option.

props.name: optionClassName
props.description: class HTML attribute for the palette button.

props.name: options
props.description: List of options (palette elements).

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: rowClassName
props.description: class HTML attribute for a palette row.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the elements.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value for the controlled usage of the component.

examples: <Palette options={[{content: '👍', value: 'like'}, {content: '❤️', value: 'heart'}]} columns={3} onUpdate={(val) => console.log(val)} />

name: PinInput
description: PinInput is a group of inputs to enter sequence of numeric or alphanumeric values quickly. Its most common use case is entering OTP or confirmation codes received through text messages (SMS), emails, or authenticator apps.

props.name: apiRef
props.description: Ref to the API (focus method).

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: aria-describedby HTML attribute.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: aria-label HTML attribute.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: aria-labelledby HTML attribute.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Enables or disables focusing on the first input on the initial render.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial value for an uncontrolled component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggles the disabled state.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error text placed under the bottom-start corner. Only visible when validationState is set to invalid.

props.name: form
props.description: The associate form of the underlying input element.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute prefix for inputs.

props.name: length
props.description: Number of input fields.

props.name: mask
props.description: When true, the input values will be masked as the password field.

props.name: name
props.description: name HTML attribute for input.

props.name: note
props.description: An element placed under the bottom-end corner that shares space with the error container.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Callback fired when the component loses focus.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Callback fired when the component receives focus.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Callback fired when any of inputs changes.

props.name: onUpdateComplete
props.description: Callback fired when any of inputs changes and all of them are filled.

props.name: otp
props.description: When true, adds autocomplete="one-time-code" to inputs.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder for inputs.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute used for testing purposes.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Parent's width distributed evenly between inputs.

props.name: size
props.description: Input field size.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: type
props.description: Determines which input value types are allowed.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state that affects the component appearance.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value for the controlled component.

name: PlaceholderContainer
description: PlaceholderContainer is a component for displaying content with an image, text content, and action controls.

props.name: image
props.description: Used to set an image by src or provide a React node.

props.name: actions
props.description: Used to render an array of button controls or a custom node.

props.name: align
props.description: Used to set content horizontal alignment.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute (optional).

props.name: content
props.description: Used to render a node instead of content (title, description, and actions).

props.name: description
props.description: Content description text.

props.name: direction
props.description: Used to set the content layout direction.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Used to override the default max-width of the container.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute.

props.name: size
props.description: Component size.

props.name: title
props.description: Content title text.

examples: <PlaceholderContainer title="No data" description="There is nothing here yet" image={<svg />} />
<PlaceholderContainer title="Empty state" image={{src: 'https://example.com/img.png', alt: 'empty'}} direction="column" size="s" />
<PlaceholderContainer title="Action needed" image={<svg />} actions={[{text: 'Add item', view: 'action', onClick: () => {}}]} />

name: Popover
description: The Popover component is technically the Popup with some trigger interactivity built-in. The Popover uses passed ReactElement from children property as a trigger, and opens whenever trigger is hovered or clicked.

props.name: children
props.type: ((props: Record<string, unknown>, ref: React.Ref<HTMLElement>) => React.ReactElement) | React.ReactElement
props.description: ReactNode which accepts DOM handlers.

props.name: className
props.description: HTML class attribute for root node.

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Delay in ms before close.

props.name: container
props.description: DOM element to which component is mounted via Portal.

props.name: content
props.description: Any content to render inside the Popover.

props.name: disablePortal
props.description: Disables using Portal.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Do not open on any event.

props.name: enableSafePolygon
props.description: Use dynamic polygon area when moving the pointer from trigger to Popover content to prevent it from closing.

props.name: hasArrow
props.description: Render an arrow pointing to the trigger.

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: Popover will not be removed from the DOM upon hiding.

props.name: modal
props.description: Enables focus trapping behaviour.

props.name: offset
props.description: Floating UI offset value.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Function that is called when the open state changes.

props.name: open
props.description: Manually control the open state.

props.name: openDelay
props.description: Delay in ms before open.

props.name: placement
props.description: Floating UI placement.

props.name: qa
props.description: Test attribute (data-qa).

props.name: strategy
props.description: Floating UI positioning strategy.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Which event should open the Popover. By default, click and hover both do.

props.name: zIndex
props.description: CSS property z-index.

examples: <Popover content="Click to open" trigger="click" hasArrow><Button>Click me</Button></Popover>

name: Popup
description: You can use a Popup to display floating content above the page. Technically, it is a wrapper around Floating UI with some default values. To manage Popup visibility, use the open property.

props.name: anchorElement
props.description: Anchor element. Can also be a VirtualElement.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: aria-describedby attribute.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: aria-label attribute.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: aria-labelledby attribute.

props.name: children
props.description: Any React content.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute for the root node.

props.name: container
props.description: DOM element to which component is mounted via Portal.

props.name: disableEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Disables triggering close on Esc.

props.name: disableFocusOut
props.description: Disables triggering close on focusout.

props.name: disableLayer
props.description: Do not use as layer.

props.name: disableOutsideClick
props.description: Disables triggering close on outside clicks.

props.name: disablePortal
props.description: Disables using Portal.

props.name: disableTransition
props.description: Disables animation of popup appearing/disappearing.

props.name: floatingMiddlewares
props.description: Floating UI middlewares. If set, completely overwrite default middlewares.

props.name: hasArrow
props.description: Renders arrow pointing to the anchor.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute.

props.name: initialFocus
props.description: Initial element to be focused.

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: Popup will not be removed from the DOM upon hiding.

props.name: modal
props.description: Enables focus trapping behaviour.

props.name: offset
props.description: Floating UI offset value.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.type: (open: boolean, event?: Event, reason?: string) => void
props.description: Handles Popup open change event.

props.name: open
props.description: Manages Popup visibility.

props.name: placement
props.description: Floating UI placement.

props.name: qa
props.description: Test attribute (data-qa).

props.name: returnFocus
props.description: Element to be focused on closing.

props.name: role
props.description: Accessibility role for popup.

props.name: strategy
props.description: Floating UI positioning strategy.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute for root node.

props.name: zIndex
props.description: CSS property z-index.

name: Portal
description: Portal is a utility component. Basically, it is a simple wrapper around React's createPortal that allows you to render children into a DOM node outside the parent component.

props.name: children
props.description: Any React content.

props.name: container
props.description: DOM element's children to mount.

props.name: disablePortal
props.description: If true, renders the children within the normal DOM hierarchy.

name: Progress
description: The Progress component shows current operation progress. It can also be divided into sections.

props.name: className
props.description: HTML class attribute.

props.name: colorStops
props.description: Sets breakpoints with themes.

props.name: colorStopsValue
props.description: Sets the value for choosing the current stop. Available range is from 0 to 100.

props.name: loading
props.description: Toggles the loading state.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the progress bar size. The text can only be displayed in m size.

props.name: stack
props.description: Configuration of composite progress bar. Not required if a value is provided.

props.name: stackClassName
props.description: HTML class attribute of stack.

props.name: text
props.description: Text inside the progress bar.

props.name: theme
props.description: Sets progress color.

props.name: value
props.description: Current progress value. Available range is from 0 to 100.

name: Radio
description: The Radio component allows the users to select a single option from a list of choices.

props.name: value
props.description: Control value.

props.name: checked
props.description: Toggles the checked state of the radio.

props.name: children
props.description: The content of the radio (usually, a label).

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: content
props.description: The content of the radio (alternative to children).

props.name: controlProps
props.description: Additional properties for the underlying input element.

props.name: controlRef
props.description: Ref to the underlying input element.

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Sets the initial checked state when the component is mounted.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggles the disabled state of the radio.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute.

props.name: name
props.description: name HTML attribute for the input element.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Event handler to use when the radio input element loses focus.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires when the radio state is changed by the user.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Event handler to use when the radio input element receives focus.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the radio state is changed and provides the checked value as a callback argument.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the radio.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: title
props.description: title HTML attribute.

name: RadioGroup
description: The RadioGroup component is used to create a group where users can select a single option from multiple choices.

props.name: children
props.description: The content of the radio group.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Sets the initial value state when the component is mounted.

props.name: direction
props.description: Determines the direction of the radio group.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggles the disabled state of the radio group.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires when the user changes the radio state.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the user changes the radio state and provides the new value as a callback argument.

props.name: optionClassName
props.description: class HTML attribute for the radio children.

props.name: options
props.description: Options for radio group.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Determines the size of the radio group.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value for the controlled component.

examples: <RadioGroup name="size" direction="vertical" size="l" onUpdate={(v) => console.log(v)} options={[{value: 's', content: 'Small'}, {value: 'l', content: 'Large'}]} />

name: SegmentedRadioGroup
description: The SegmentedRadioGroup component is used to create a group of radio buttons where users can select a single option from multiple choices.

props.name: children
props.description: Content of the radio button.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Sets the initial value state when the component is mounted.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggles the disabled state of the radio button.

props.name: name
props.description: name HTML attribute for the input element.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Event handler to use when the radio input element loses focus.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires when the user changes the radio button state.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Event handler to use when the radio input element receives focus.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the user changes the radio button state and provides the new value as a callback argument.

props.name: options
props.description: Options for radio button.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the radio button.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value for the controlled component.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets the width of the radio button.

examples: <SegmentedRadioGroup size="l" width="max" options={[{value: 'list', content: 'List'}, {value: 'grid', content: 'Grid'}]} onUpdate={setView} />

name: Select
description: Select is a control that provides a list of options that a user can select.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: controlClassName
props.description: class HTML attribute for the control element.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Default value for uncontrolled component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the select.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Determines content of the error message.

props.name: errorPlacement
props.description: Determines whether the error message will be placed under the input field or in a tooltip.

props.name: filter
props.description: Controlled filter value.

props.name: filterable
props.description: Enables filtering/search in the options list.

props.name: filterPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the filter input.

props.name: form
props.description: The associate form.

props.name: hasClear
props.description: Shows a clear button.

props.name: hasCounter
props.description: Shows selected options count if multiple selection is available.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text for the control.

props.name: loading
props.description: Indicates loading state.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allows selecting multiple options.

props.name: name
props.description: name HTML attribute.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Fires when the control lost focus.

props.name: onFilterChange
props.description: Callback when filter changes.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Fires when the control gets focus.

props.name: onLoadMore
props.description: Callback to load more options.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the selected value changes.

props.name: options
props.description: Options to select.

props.name: pin
props.description: Border view pin.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text.

props.name: popupClassName
props.description: class HTML attribute for the popup.

props.name: popupPlacement
props.description: Popup placement.

props.name: popupWidth
props.description: Width of the popup.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the control.

props.name: title
props.description: title HTML attribute.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Describes the validation state.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value for the controlled component.

props.name: view
props.description: View of the control.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the control.

examples: <Select multiple filterable options={[{value: 'a', content: 'Alpha'}, {value: 'b', content: 'Beta'}]} onUpdate={setSelected} />

name: Sheet
description: Sheet is a component designed for using in the mobile context as an information or interactive element. You can place content of any size in it, since the internal scrolling and dynamic resizing are supported.

props.name: visible
props.description: Show/hide sheet.

props.name: allowHideOnContentScroll
props.description: Enables closing the sheet by swiping down when content is scrolled to top or has no scroll.

props.name: alwaysFullHeight
props.description: Sheet height will always have the maximum value.

props.name: children
props.description: Sheet content.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: container
props.description: DOM element to which component is mounted via Portal.

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: class HTML attribute for the sheet content.

props.name: disablePortal
props.description: Disables using Portal.

props.name: hideTopBar
props.description: Hides the top bar with the resize handle.

props.name: id
props.description: Sheet ID used as hash in a URL. Specify multiple IDs if more than one sheet can be on a page.

props.name: maxContentHeightCoefficient
props.description: Coefficient that determines the maximum height of the Sheet relative to the height of the viewport (range 0-1).

props.name: onClose
props.description: Handler for close event.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute.

props.name: swipeAreaClassName
props.description: class HTML attribute for the swipe area.

props.name: title
props.description: Sheet window title.

name: Skeleton
description: The Skeleton component displays a placeholder preview of your content before the data gets loaded. This preview is shown in order to reduce the loading time frustration.

props.name: animation
props.description: Animation type to apply to the skeleton.

props.name: className
props.description: Custom CSS class for the root element.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: style
props.description: Custom CSS properties for root element.

name: Slider
description: The slider is a customizable and responsive React component that allows users to select a single value or a range of values from a specified data set.

props.name: apiRef
props.description: Ref to Slider's component props of focus and blur.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: aria-label for the slider handle(s).

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: aria-labelledby for the slider handle(s).

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: The control's autoFocus attribute.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The control's default value, used when the component is not controlled.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates that the user cannot interact with the control.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Text of an error to show.

props.name: form
props.description: The associate form of the hidden input element.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute.

props.name: inverted
props.description: Inverted view of the slider's track.

props.name: markFormat
props.description: Formatter for marks text.

props.name: marks
props.description: Marks on the slider. It can be either the number of marks or a list of them.

props.name: max
props.description: Max value of the component.

props.name: min
props.description: Min value of the component.

props.name: name
props.description: Name attribute of the hidden input element.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Fires when the control lost focus.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Fires when the control gets focus.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the slider's value is updated by the user.

props.name: onUpdateComplete
props.description: Fires when ontouchend or onmouseup is triggered.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the control.

props.name: startPoint
props.description: Start point of the track. Ignored for range slider.

props.name: step
props.description: Value to be added or subtracted on each step.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The control's tabIndex attribute.

props.name: tooltipDisplay
props.description: Specifies the tooltip behaviour.

props.name: tooltipFormat
props.description: Format of the slider's value in the tooltip.

props.name: validationState
props.description: Describes the validation state.

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the control.

examples: <Slider value={value} min={0} max={200} step={5} tooltipDisplay="always" onUpdate={setValue} />

name: Spin
description: The Spin component displays the loading state (a rotating semicircle) in inline scenarios. Unlike Loader, this component is used to display the loading state in inline scenarios, e.g., in a Button or Label.

props.name: className
props.description: Custom CSS class for the root element.

props.name: qa
props.description: Test attribute (data-qa).

props.name: size
props.description: Spin size.

props.name: style
props.description: Custom CSS styles for root element.

name: Stepper
description: Stepper conveys progress through numbered steps. It provides a wizard-like workflow. Steppers display progress through a sequence of logical and numbered steps.

props.name: children
props.description: Stepper items.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: Identifies the element(s) that describe the object.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: Identifies the element(s) that label the current element.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name for the Steps container.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Function for changing the current step.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: separator
props.description: Custom separator node.

props.name: size
props.description: Set the step size.

props.name: style
props.description: Sets the inline style for the Steps container.

props.name: value
props.description: Current selected step id.

name: Switch
description: The Switch component is used to toggle between two states: typically, between on and off, or enabled and disabled.

props.name: checked
props.description: Toggles the checked state of the switch.

props.name: children
props.description: The content of the switch (usually, a label).

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: content
props.description: The content of the switch (alternative to children).

props.name: controlProps
props.description: Additional properties for the underlying input element.

props.name: controlRef
props.description: Ref to the underlying input element.

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Sets the initial checked state when the component is mounted.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggles the disabled state of the switch.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Toggles the indeterminate state of the switch.

props.name: loading
props.description: Toggles the loading state of the switch.

props.name: name
props.description: name HTML attribute for the input element.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Event handler when the switch input element loses focus.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires when the switch state is changed by the user.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Event handler when the switch input element receives focus.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the switch state is changed by the user and provides the checked value.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the switch.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: title
props.description: title HTML attribute.

props.name: value
props.description: value HTML attribute for the input element.

name: Table
description: A Table allows selecting and sorting rows, as well as performing actions on a row.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column settings.

props.name: data
props.description: Data.

props.name: className
props.description: Table CSS class.

props.name: edgePadding
props.description: Adds horizontal padding for edge cells.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Returning a message if the data is missing.

props.name: getRowClassNames
props.description: Row CSS classes.

props.name: getRowDescriptor
props.description: Handler to get the row descriptor.

props.name: getRowId
props.description: Row ID used when selecting and sorting rows.

props.name: isRowDisabled
props.description: Condition for disabling columns.

props.name: onRowClick
props.type: (item: any, index: number, event: React.MouseEvent<HTMLTableRowElement>) => void
props.description: Row click handler.

props.name: onRowMouseEnter
props.type: (item: any, index: number, event: React.MouseEvent<HTMLTableRowElement>) => void
props.description: Row mouseenter handler.

props.name: onRowMouseLeave
props.type: (item: any, index: number, event: React.MouseEvent<HTMLTableRowElement>) => void
props.description: Row mouseleave handler.

props.name: stickyHorizontalScroll
props.description: Adds a horizontal sticky scroll in a table.

props.name: stickyHorizontalScrollBreakpoint
props.description: Threshold the parent block should reach before making a scroll sticky.

props.name: verticalAlign
props.description: Vertical alignment of content.

examples: <Table data={rows} columns={cols} emptyMessage="No records found" stickyHorizontalScroll />

name: TableColumnSetup
description: The TableColumnSetup component provides a user interface for configuring table column visibility and order. It displays a button that opens a popup with a list of available columns, allowing users to show/hide columns and optionally reorder them via drag and drop.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of column configuration items.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Callback fired when column configuration changes.

props.name: className
props.description: Custom CSS class for the root element.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the switcher button.

props.name: getItemTitle
props.description: Function to get item title.

props.name: hideApplyButton
props.description: When true, changes are applied immediately; when false, changes require clicking Apply button.

props.name: popupPlacement
props.description: Popup placement relative to trigger.

props.name: popupWidth
props.description: Width of the popup.

props.name: renderSwitcher
props.description: Custom render function for the switcher button.

props.name: showStatus
props.description: Shows selected/total columns count in switcher button.

props.name: sortable
props.description: Enables drag and drop sorting of columns.

examples: <TableColumnSetup items={[{id: 'name', title: 'Name', selected: true, required: true}, {id: 'email', title: 'Email', selected: true}]} onUpdate={handleUpdate} />

name: Text
description: A component for working with typography. Provides a convenient API for working with mixins of typography and text colors.

props.name: as
props.description: Ability to override default html tag.

props.name: children
props.description: Text content.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name.

props.name: color
props.description: Text color.

props.name: ellipsis
props.description: Hidden overflow content will be displayed with ellipsis.

props.name: ellipsisLines
props.description: Number of lines after which text is cropped with ellipsis (-webkit-line-clamp).

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: variant
props.description: Typography variant.

props.name: whiteSpace
props.description: white-space CSS property.

props.name: wordBreak
props.description: word-break CSS property.

name: Toaster
description: This is a component for adjustable notifications also known as toasts.

props.name: name
props.description: Unique toast identifier.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action buttons or custom render function.

props.name: autoHiding
props.description: Duration in ms before the toast auto-hides. Set to false to disable.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: content
props.description: Toast content.

props.name: isClosable
props.description: Shows a close button.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback when toast is closed.

props.name: renderIcon
props.description: Function for toast icon customization.

props.name: theme
props.description: Toast theme.

props.name: title
props.description: Toast title.

examples: const {add} = useToaster(); add({name: 'error', title: 'Error occurred', theme: 'danger', content: 'Please try again.', isClosable: true});

name: Toc
description: The Toc component is designed to display a table of contents of the page, namely showing a set items with two levels of hierarchy.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class.

props.name: items
props.description: TOC elements.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Item click handler.

props.name: qa
props.description: The value to provide to the data-qa attribute of the Toc container.

props.name: value
props.description: Current active item.

examples: <Toc items={[{value: 'sec1', content: 'Section 1', href: '#sec1', items: [{value: 'sub1', content: 'Subsection', href: '#sub1'}]}]} />

name: Tooltip
description: A simple text tip that uses its child node as an anchor. This component accepts only text content and may be an excellent alternative to the browser's title attribute with its small size and long appearance delay.

props.name: children
props.type: React.ReactElement | ((props: Record<string, unknown>, ref: React.Ref<HTMLElement>) => React.ReactElement)
props.description: Anchor element for the Tooltip.

props.name: className
props.description: class HTML attribute.

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Number of ms to delay hiding the Tooltip after the hover ends.

props.name: container
props.description: DOM element to which component is mounted via Portal.

props.name: content
props.description: Content that will be shown in the Tooltip.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Prevent the Tooltip from opening.

props.name: disablePortal
props.description: Disables using Portal.

props.name: offset
props.description: Tooltip offset from its anchor.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.type: (open: boolean, event?: Event, reason?: string) => void
props.description: Callback to handle open state change.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state.

props.name: openDelay
props.description: Number of ms to delay showing the Tooltip after the hover begins.

props.name: placement
props.description: Tooltip position relative to its anchor.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: role
props.description: The role Tooltip is used for.

props.name: strategy
props.description: The type of CSS position property to use.

props.name: style
props.description: style HTML attribute.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Event type that should trigger opening. By default both hover and focus do.

examples: <Tooltip content="Click to copy" placement="top" openDelay={200}><Icon data={Copy} /></Tooltip>

name: User
description: This is a general component for displaying a user avatar with an info block. It uses the Avatar component to render the avatar. It can also accept a custom React node as an avatar.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: aria-describedby for the user section.

props.name: aria-details
props.description: aria-details for the user section.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: aria-label for the user section.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: aria-labelledby for the user section.

props.name: avatar
props.description: User avatar.

props.name: className
props.description: Custom CSS class for the root element.

props.name: description
props.description: User description.

props.name: name
props.description: User name.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: User section size.

props.name: style
props.description: HTML style attribute.

name: UserLabel
description: The UserLabel component can be used to display users or user-related information.

props.name: text
props.description: Visible text.

props.name: avatar
props.description: User avatar. Only works with type: 'person'.

props.name: className
props.description: Custom CSS class for the root element.

props.name: description
props.description: User description.

props.name: onClick
props.description: click event handler for the component.

props.name: onCloseClick
props.description: click event handler for the cross-icon button.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute, used for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Avatar size.

props.name: style
props.description: HTML style attribute.

props.name: type
props.description: Avatar appearance.

props.name: view
props.description: UserLabel view.

examples: <UserLabel text="Alice" view="outlined" onCloseClick={() => remove('alice')} onClick={() => select('alice')} />
